channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Qualified Health Raises $125M for Hospital AI Platform
item.description: Qualified Health closed a $125M Series B led by NEA, valuing the startup at up to $1 billion. Its platform supports 500,000 users across 16 health systems. At UTMB, one deployment delivered $15 million in run-rate impact in six months. Anthropic invested as b… [Anthropic]

item.title: Semicon China 2026: AI spending nears US$800 billion, IBS flags 2028 chip cycle risk
item.description: SEMICON China 2026 spotlighted the scale of the AI investment boom, with Handel Jones, CEO of International Business Strategies (IBS), estimating that global AI and data center capital expenditure has surged from about US$110 billion in 2020 to roughly US$600…

item.title: South Korean chip giants step up China investments to combat global AI memory shortage
item.description: Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix are stepping up investments in their China wafer fabs as they race to boost supply amid a tightening memory chip market driven by demand for artificial intelligence computing, underscoring China’s continued role in semiconduct… [Samsung, Intel]

item.title: US pharma giant Eli Lilly, Insilico Medicine secure deal worth $2.75 billion to bring AI-developed drugs to market
item.description: US pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly has reached a deal worth $2.75 billion with Insilico Medicine. Under the agreement, Lilly will bring AI-developed drugs to the global market, while Insilico will receive $115 million upfront, with the remainder tied to regula…

item.title: Deloitte South Asia COO dismisses AI job loss fears, pushes for upskilling amid massive India hiring
item.description: Deloitte South Asia Chief Operating Officer Nitin Kini states Artificial Intelligence will not cause job losses. Instead, the company is focusing on upskilling its workforce to tackle complex business challenges. Deloitte plans to launch a Quantum Centre of E… [Intel]

item.title: Scaling industrial AI is more a human than a technical challenge
item.description: Industrial artificial intelligence has moved from promise to practice. A Cisco Systems Inc. survey of 1,000 industry leaders found that 61% of organizations across manufacturing, transportation and utilities are deploying AI to improve productivity, reduce co… [Intel, Cisco]
